title: Just Shapes & Beats

cpu: AMD A10-7890K Radeon R7, 12 Compute Cores 4C+8G
notes: Runs perfectly, but locks up if you alt-f4 out of the game. Intro cutscene does not show, and other pre-rendered cutscenes may do the same. (Most cutscenes are in-engine)
title: Just Shapes & Beats

notes: Games runs nearly flawlessly but with certain issues. After the initial launch of the game, the screen stays black until the title screen. When playing with a monitor with a high refresh rate the game physics speed up which does not happen under normal circumstances. Exiting the game leads to a crash which may force you to kill the process with htop or similar programs.
title: Just Shapes & Beats
